title: Software Engineer - AI/ML
company_focus: Agentic AI workflow automation platform for enterprise
description:
Artian AI is pioneering a transformative agentic AI-driven
approach to enterprise process automation, redefining what’s
possible in regulated industries like financial services. By
advancing the concept of AI Workflow Agents and enabling
seamless collaboration among them, Artian is poised to
deliver what RPA and BPM tools have long promised but never
achieved. With a vision to make AI-powered automation
scalable, reliable, and adaptable, Artian is starting with
financial services but sees vast potential for its Artian
Intelligence Platform across industries. Led by a team of
experts at the forefront of AI research and enterprise
innovation, Artian is shaping the future of multi-agent
automation in large-scale, mission-critical environments.
Learn more about us at https://artian.ai/company.

We are looking for an AI/ML Engineer to accelerate the
development of our innovative AI platform. Candidates must
have deep expertise in Python, PyTorch, sklearn, embeddings,
vector databases, graph databases, LLM APIs (i.e., OpenAI,
Claude, Gemini, Llama, Mistral, etc.), LLM prompt
engineering, LLM fine tuning, ML model hyperparameter
tuning, and paradigms like RAG, AI agents, and multi-agent
systems. As part of a small cross-functional team, you will
be working across components and services. Experience at a
successful startup is a nice-to-have.

The opportunity that lays ahead of us is immediate, concrete
and very large, which makes it incredibly exciting for us to
build products and solve customer use cases at Artian. We
hope to convey our enthusiasm to you and we look forward to
hearing about how you can help drive our journey!

Please note: This position is on-site in New York, with some
flexibility.

Preferred Qualifications:

- Master's (MS) or Doctorate (PhD) in Computer Science or
  closely related field
- Solid understanding of CS fundamentals including algorithms
  and data structures
- Experience with distributed architectures and event-driven
  programming
- Experience with data processing (big data, event streams,
  relational databases, etc.)
- Work experience at startups, fintechs or larger tech
  companies

What We Offer:

- Competitive salary and equity options.
- Opportunity to work with leading-edge AI technologies in a
  fast-growing startup.
- Collaborative, inclusive, and innovative team culture.
- Professional development opportunities, including
  certifications and training.
- Health insurance and other benefits.

How to Apply: If you're passionate about modern distributed
systems development in Python, and want to help shape the
future of AI technology, we'd love to hear from you. Please
submit your resume and a brief cover letter outlining your
experience and interest in the role at
https://www.artian.ai/careers.
responsibilities: Build and deploy AI Workflow Agents for enterprise process automation
Implement RAG, AI agents, and multi-agent systems using LLM APIs
Perform LLM fine-tuning and ML model hyperparameter optimization
Work with embeddings and vector databases for AI systems
Develop across components and services in a cross-functional team
Apply AI/ML solutions to regulated industries, starting with financial services
use_cases: Enterprise process automation for regulated industries like financial services
Multi-agent automation in large-scale, mission-critical environments
Scalable and reliable AI-powered automation replacing RPA and BPM tools
Collaborative AI workflows enabling seamless agent cooperation
Financial services process automation with future expansion to other industries
ai_classification_reasoning:
Role requires hands-on work with LLMs including prompt
engineering, fine-tuning, and building RAG and multi-agent
systems. Direct involvement in developing AI/ML models and
agentic AI workflows rather than supporting infrastructure.
